title: Remove hardcoded TP/SL JS constants from dashboard.html
objective: DASH_006 added server-side tp_price and sl_price to /api/trades. The two hardcoded JS fallback constants are now redundant and should be removed.
prerequisite: DASH_006 must be complete (tp_price and sl_price must be in /api/trades response before removing the JS fallbacks)
deliverables: Delete both constant lines from dashboard.html
Confirm no other JS in the file references TP_PRICE or SL_PCT as standalone variables (the card builder already reads r.tp_price and r.sl_price from the trade object)
acceptance_criteria: Neither TP_PRICE nor SL_PCT appear anywhere in dashboard.html after the change
verification: grep -n 'TP_PRICE\|SL_PCT' dashboard.html  — must return no matches
